title: Count Numbers 1 to 10
description: Count objects and identify numbers from 1 to 10.

title: Recognize Capital Letters
description: Identify and match capital letters A to Z.

title: Find Before and After Numbers
description: Choose which number comes before or after a given number.

title: Identify Common 2D Shapes
description: Recognize circle, square, triangle, and rectangle in context.

title: Identify Beginning Sounds
description: Match simple words to their beginning letter sounds.
